item.title: US advances to Olympic men's hockey semifinals with 2-1 victory over Sweden
item.description: United States advances to Olympic men's hockey semifinals with 2-1 overtime victory over Sweden

item.title: Air Force One will be painted red, white and blue as Trump hinted, US military says
item.description: The U.S. military says a red, white and blue color scheme championed by President Donald Trump will become the new look for Air Force One

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions

item.title: Genealogical sites have helped solve major crimes
item.description: Authorities trying to solve the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie say they might tap DNA genealogy databases

item.title: A judge weighs extending protections for refugees in Minnesota
item.description: A federal judge will hear arguments Thursday on whether he should extend an order that protects Minnesota refugees who are lawfully in the U.S. from b...
